description: Computes the symmetric difference (XOR) of clippable shapes. Returns the non-overlapping regions — areas in one shape but not in both. Useful for highlighting differences between shapes and creating crescent or complementary regions.
utility: Find non-overlapping regions of shapes (symmetric difference)

alternates.description: XOR of three or more shapes

examples.expression:
G = g2d()
C1 = circle(G, 3, 0, 0)
C2 = circle(G, 3, 4, 0)
X = xor(G, C1, C2)

G = g2d()
C1 = circle(G, 3, -2, 0)
C2 = circle(G, 3, 2, 0)
C3 = circle(G, 3, 0, 2)
X = xor(G, C1, C2, C3)
